entries.source: Explore history, public figures, causes, debates, philosophy, and source critique with AI learning modes that separate evidence from simulation.
entries.value: Hlola umlando, abantu bomphakathi, izimbangela, izinkulumo-mpikiswano, ifilosofi, nokugxeka imithombo ngezindlela zokufunda nge-AI ezihlukanisa ubufakazi nokulingisa.

entries.source: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Hlola ubunikazi, ulwazi, ubulungiswa, inkululeko, injabulo, neminye imibuzo ejulile ngokucabanga ngokucophelela.

entries.source: Explore inspir AI learning by subject: math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep, each connected to public guest modes, guides, prompts, and review loops.
entries.value: Hlola ukufunda nge-AI kwe-inspir ngokwesifundo: i-math, ukubhala, ukubhala ikhodi, umlando, umsebenzi wasekhaya, nokulungiselela izivivinyo, ngakunye kuxhunywe ezindleleni zezivakashi zomphakathi, imihlahlandlela, imiyalo, nemijikelezo yokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Feynman Tutor
entries.value: Umfundisi u-Feynman

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Imodi Yokufunda nge-AI ye-Feynman Tutor iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Zama ukuchaza umqondo kalula. Uthisha wakho ubona izikhala, abuze imibuzo, futhi akusize wakhe kabusha incazelo.

entries.source: First-principles learning
entries.value: Ukufunda ngezizathu zokuqala

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Okokuqala, uthisha uhlonza inhloso. "Ngifuna ukuqonda izindleko zethuba" kuhlukile kokuthi "Ngidinga ukuxazulula lo mbuzo womsebenzi wasekhaya wezomnotho" noma "Ngidinga ukuvikela isikhundla enkulumweni-mpikiswano." Inhloso ibumba imibuzo.

entries.source: Flashcard Builder
entries.value: Umklami Wama-Flashcard

entries.source: Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Imiyalo ye-Flashcard Builder nomjikelezo wokufunda

entries.source: flashcard generation
entries.value: ukukhiqizwa kwamakhadi okufunda

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda angenye yezindlela ezilula kakhulu zokwenza lokhu.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda anamandla, kodwa awasona sonke isinqubo sokutadisha. Alungele kakhulu ukubuyisa ulwazi, amagama, izincazelo, amafomula, umehluko, nezibonelo ezisemqoka. Abuthakathaka lapho umfundi engakaze awuqonde umqondo ekuqaleni.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Amakhadi okufunda asebenza kahle kakhulu lapho evivinya umqondo owodwa ngesikhathi, eveza izimpendulo kuphela ngemva komzamo, futhi ebuyekeza amakhadi aphuthelwe ngokushesha.

entries.source: Follow practical study workflows that connect free guest AI learning modes with guides, prompts, quizzes, and review loops.
entries.value: Landela ukugeleza kokutadisha okusebenzayo okuxhumanisa izindlela zamahhala zezivakashi zokufunda nge-AI nemihlahlandlela, imiyalo, ama-quiz, nemijikelezo yokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Follow the story into live public pages.
entries.value: Landela indaba uye emakhasini omphakathi abukhoma.

entries.source: Footer links
entries.value: Izixhumanisi ze-footer

entries.source: For
entries.value: Nge

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Ukuze uthole umzila ojulile, funda umhlahlandlela we-Flashcard Builder kanye nemiyalo ye-Flashcard Builder nomjikelezo wokufunda. Inhloso akulona iqoqo elihle lamakhadi. Inhloso ukukhumbula okuningi lapho amanothi esephelile.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Kumfundi, lokho kungazwakala kuhluke kakhulu ekusesheni iwebhu. Ukusesha kunikeza amakhasi. Umlingani wokufunda unikeza indlela.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Ukuze ubone kabanzi ukuthi amakhasi omphakathi axhumana kanjani, bheka imephu yokufunda nge-AI, izikhungo zezihloko, noma umtapo wemiyalo yokufunda nge-AI. La makhasi aklanyelwe ukwenza umkhiqizo uqondakale kubafundi futhi utholakale ezinhlelweni zosesho ngaphandle kokufihla izingxenye eziwusizo ngemuva kodonga lwe-akhawunti.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Isibonelo, umfundi ofunda intando yeningi angakhuluma no-Ambedkar, bese ecela i-Source Critic ihlole inkulumo noma isiqeshana somthethosisekelo. Umfundi ofunda idolobha angaqala nge-Geography Explorer ukuze aqonde indawo, bese edlulela engxoxweni yomlando.

entries.source: For teachers
entries.value: Okwothisha

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Okokuqala ngqa, ikoloni langaphambili elalingenawo umlando wesizwe wangaphambilini laba amandla omhlaba. Amakhosi nezindlovukazi zaseYurophu zagumbuqelwa, futhi i-United States of America yavela njengophawu lwentando yeningi, ubungxiwankulu, nomhlaba okhululekile. Ngesikhathi esifanayo, kwavela umbono omusha wobukhomanisi futhi i-Soviet Union yaba ukubonakala kwawo okusebenzayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Buza noma yimuphi umbuzo futhi ufunde ngezincazelo ezicacile, izibonelo, imiyalo elandelayo, nokufundisa kwe-AI okunesineke.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Buza imibuzo, phonsela imibono inselele, futhi ufunde umlando ngezingxoxo ezisekelwe kahle nabantu bomphakathi besikhathi esedlule.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Cabangisisa ngamaphrojekthi, izindaba, imiklamo, izihloko, izivivinyo, nama-engeli angalindelekile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Letha isiqeshana noma umqondo wencwadi bese wakhe ukuqonda ngezifinyezo, amagama, ukucatshangelwa, nengxoxo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Yakha iphasiphothi yesikhathi, dlula isexwayiso sokuhamba, bese uhlola umhlaba womlando ngesigcawu, imephu, umugqa wesikhathi, abantu, imithetho, impahla, nobufakazi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Yakha amagama ngencazelo, izibonelo, izinkomba zokuphimisa, izibambo zenkumbulo, nokuzijwayeza okusheshayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Guqula amaqiniso, izinhlu, izinkulumo, noma ukulandelana kube izigcawu zengqondo ezikhumbulekayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Dala uhlelo lokutadisha oluzungeze isikhathi sakho, amandla, izinhloso, nezindawo ezibuthakathaka.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Phikisana nganoma yisiphi isihloko, uphonselwe inselele, qhathanisa izimangalo, futhi ufunde ukwenza izimpikiswano ezinamandla.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Ngena ecaleni elingokoqobo, yenza izinqumo, bona imiphumela, futhi ufunde isimiso esingemuva kokukhetha ngakunye.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlola izihloko, izimangalo, amavidiyo, noma okuthunyelwe mayelana nobufakazi, ukuchema, ukuthembeka, nomongo oshodayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlola imisebenzi yobuciko, izitayela, abaculi, izinqumo ezibonakalayo, nokuthi yini eyenza isithombe sibe namandla.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlola imisebenzi ngezintshisekelo, amakhono, izibonelo zosuku empilweni, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlola amazwe, amadolobha, imifula, izimo zezulu, ukufuduka, izinsiza, nokuthi i-geography ibumba kanjani impilo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlola ubuwena, ulwazi, ubulungiswa, inkululeko, injabulo, neminye imibuzo ejulile ngokucabanga ngokucophelela.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Khiqiza i-quiz egxilile enezinketho eziningi kunoma yisiphi isifundo bese ubuyekeza izincazelo ngemva kwempendulo ngayinye.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Phuma lapho ubambeke khona ngokomzwelo, thola isinyathelo esilandelayo esincane, futhi wakhe umfutho kabusha ngaphandle kwecala.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Phuma lapho ubambeke khona emsebenzini wasekhaya ngezinkomba ezinesimilo, izibonelo, ukuhlola, nokuqeqeshwa isinyathelo ngesinyathelo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Thuthukisa ukubhala ngokuhlela, ukubuyekeza, isakhiwo, nempendulo egcina izwi lakho lingashintshi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Funda ngokwenza, ukubona, ukuqhathanisa, ukulungisa, nokufakazela ubungcweti. Uhlelo lwakha ikhanvasi yesifundo ebukhoma ezungeze inhloso yakho esikhundleni sokuguqula ukufundisa kube ingxoxo ende. Zama: "Ngifundise ukumodela kwezezimali."

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Funda imithethosisekelo, intando yeningi, ukhetho, izinkantolo, amalungelo, imisebenzi, nenqubomgomo yomphakathi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Funda amanothi, ama-chord, izikali, isigqi, imibono yokuqeqesha indlebe, nokuthi izingoma zakhiwa kanjani.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Funda ngemibuzo egxilile, izeluleko, nokuzindla esikhundleni sokufunda izimpendulo ungenzi lutho.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Yenza ukufunda kuzwakale njengomdlalo onohambo, amazinga, amaphuzu, izinselele, nemizuliswano yesikhulu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Mepha ukuthi imibono ihlobana kanjani, kusukela ezimbangeleni nemiphumeleni kuya ezigabeni, izibonelo, nokuphikisana.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Qaphela ukuthi yini ekusiza ufunde, yini ekuvimba, nokuthi ungaba kanjani umfundi onamandla.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Vula indawo yokusebenza eyabiwe nomhlanganyeli we-AI. Yenza into eluhlaka, nishintshane ngokuhlela, niphoqe izindawo ezibuthakathaka, nibhale izinqumo, futhi niphume nenqubekela phambili ecacile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Namathisela umbuzo, impendulo yakho, nempendulo elindelekile uma unayo. Umngane wakho uchaza ukucabanga futhi akusize ugweme iphutha elifanayo ngokuzayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Namathisela idatha, izincazelo zamashadi, noma imiphumela bese ufunda ukuthi zisho ukuthini, zingasho ukuthini, nokuthi yini ongayibuza ngokulandelayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlela iphrojekthi yesikole, yobuciko, yokubhala ikhodi, noma yomuntu siqu ngobubanzi, izigaba, okuvimba, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlela futhi uqhube amasession okubuyekeza asheshayo aqinisa inkumbulo yesikhathi eside.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlela ukubonisa okuphephile, qonda okuguquguqukayo, bikezela imiphumela, futhi ucabange ususela ebufakazini njengososayensi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Dlala ngezimakethe, ukuswela, izikhuthazi, inqubomgomo, nezimali zomuntu ngokulingisa okulula.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Zijwayeze ulimi ezimeni ezingokoqobo ezifana namakhefi, ama-interview, ukuhamba, nempilo yansuku zonke, ngez corrections ngemva komjikelezo ngamunye.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Zijwayeze impikiswano ngokuphikisana nobuntu bomphakathi noma obuqanjiwe esihlokweni osikhethayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Zijwayeze ukuxoxisana, ukungqubuzana, ukweseka amakhasimende, ubuholi, noma noma iyiphi ingxoxo enezinga eliphezulu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Zijwayeze i-viva, izivivinyo zomlomo, ukuvikela amaphrojekthi, nemibuzo yokulandela ngokushesha ngempendulo ezolile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Lungiselela ama-interview esikole, i-internship, umsebenzi, noma umfundaze ngemibuzo engokoqobo nempendulo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Lungiselela izinkulumo, izethulo, ama-interview, noma izivivinyo zomlomo ngemiyalo, isikhathi, nempendulo ngesakhiwo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Yisho ukuthi ucabanga ukuthi kwenzekani, futhi umngane wakho axilonge ukungaqondi okufihlekile ngokuhlola ngobumnene.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Zama ukuchaza umqondo kalula. Uthisha wakho ubona izikhala, abuze imibuzo, futhi akusize wakhe kabusha incazelo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Guqula isihloko esibanzi sibe imibuzo yocwaningo, amagama osesho, uhlaka, namanothi emithombo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Guqula imiqondo ibe izindaba, abalingiswa, izingxabano, nezigcawu ezikhumbulekayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Guqula izinhloso zibe imikhuba yokufunda emincane ephindekayo enezicuphi, imivuzo, nezinhlelo zokululama.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Guqula amanothi noma izihloko zibe amakhadi okufunda agxilile anezeluleko, izimpendulo, izibonelo, nemigibe evamile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Guqula isilabhasi yakho, usuku lwesivivinyo, isikhathi, nezindawo ezibuthakathaka zibe uhlelo lokutadisha olusebenzayo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Qonda ikhodi, lungisa amaphutha, funda imiqondo yokuhlela, futhi wakhe amaphrojekthi amancane isinyathelo ngesinyathelo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Hlaziya izehlakalo zomlando ngezimbangela, izicuphi, imiphumela, namathuba ahlukile.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Sebenza nge-algebra, i-calculus, izinkinga zamagama, nemiqondo ye-math isinyathelo ngesinyathelo nomqeqeshi we-AI.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Kule modi, umsebenzi ulula: Sebenza ngezinkinga zokuziphatha ngokukala ababambiqhaza, imiphumela, imisebenzi, amalungelo, nokuhwebelana.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Ekubhaleni, lokho kusho ukusebenzisa i-Writing Coach ukuthuthukisa ithisisi, isakhiwo, noma indima kuyilapho ugcina izwi lakho. Ekhodini, kusho ukusebenzisa i-Code Tutor ukuchaza amaphutha, ukukucela ubikezele okukhiphayo, nokukusiza ukulungisa iphutha kunokunamathisela isixazululo esiphelele. Ezivivinyweni, kusho ukusebenzisa i-Exam Prep Planner ukunquma ukuthi yini okufanele uyibuyekeze kuqala nokuthi uzihlola kanjani.

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic
entries.value: Umakhi Wama-Quiz we-AI Wamahhala Wanoma Yisiphi Isihloko

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Umakhi Wama-Quiz we-AI Wamahhala Wanoma Yisiphi Isihloko uyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Khetha noma yisiphi isihloko bese ubhekana ne-quiz egxilile yemibuzo eyi-10 enezinketho eziningi. Uphendula umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, uthole impendulo esheshayo, bese uqeda ngesikolo nokubuyekeza.
